The 2 eslint-disable-next-line comments in useUrlSync.ts (L76, L95) are for: (1) mount-only [] effect (intentional, no-deps AC-004), (2) 8-primitive deps array (syncToUrl unstability when debounceMs=0). Neither is a C-32 unstable-setter case — onHydrate handled via useRef (hydrateRef, option 2 per D5).
